zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Avice Upton于1310年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾維可姆时，她的父亲Sir Walter de Upton38岁，母亲Avice Kimble35岁。她和Sir Richard de Hampden至少有3个儿子和2个女儿。她去世在英国巴金哈姆爾。

nameMeanings.name: Upton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the many places in England called Upton, most of which are named with Old English upp ‘upper’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though some have different origins, such as one in Essex, originally named with the phrase upp in tūne ‘up in the settlement’, i.e. the higher part of the settlement, and Upton Lovell (Wiltshire), which derives from the Old English personal name Ubba + Old English tūn. This name was brought to Ireland (Antrim) in 1598 by Henry Upton, from Upton in Devon.

variants.name: Uptain
meanings: Perhaps an altered form of English   Upton  .

nameMeanings.name: Avice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French form of the ancient Germanic name Aveza, derived from a short form of one or more compound names containing the first element av (as in Ava ; the meaning is uncertain). The correspondence in form to the Latin word avis ‘bird’ is coincidental.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Avice Upton was born in 1310, in Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, England, her father, Sir Walter de Upton, was 38 and her mother, Avice Kimble, was 35. She had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Sir Richard de Hampden. She died in Buckinghamshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Avice Upton est née en 1310, à Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Walter de Upton, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Avice Kimble, avait 35 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Sir Richard de Hampden. Elle est décédée à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Avice Upton 1310 in Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Walter de Upton 38 und ihre Mutter Avice Kimble 35. Sie hatte mit Sir Richard de Hampden mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb in Buckinghamshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Avice Upton è nata il nel 1310 nel Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, England, sua padre, Sir Walter de Upton, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Avice Kimble, aveva 35 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con Sir Richard de Hampden. Morì nel Buckinghamshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Avice Uptonが1310年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアウイコンベで生まれた時，父Sir Walter de Uptonは38歳，母Avice Kimbleは35歳であった。彼女はSir Richard de Hampdenとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女はイギリスブクインガムシュアイアで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Avice Upton(이)가 1310년 영국 벅잉함실르 윈이코브에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Walter de Upton(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Avice Kimble(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 Sir Richard de Hampden(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 벅잉함실르에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Avice Upton nasceu em 1310, em Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Walter de Upton, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Avice Kimble, tinha 35 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com Sir Richard de Hampden. Ela faleceu em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Avice Upton родилась в 1310 г. в местности викомб, буккингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Walter de Upton было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Avice Kimble, 35. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Sir Richard de Hampden. Она умерла в местности буккингхамшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Avice Upton nació en 1310, en Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Walter de Upton, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Avice Kimble, tenía 35 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas con Sir Richard de Hampden. Murió en Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra.
